description: District Line: Minor delays between Earl's Court and Wimbledon while we fix a points failure at Wimbledon. GOOD SERVICE on the rest of the line.
Piccadilly Line: Minor delays between Acton Town and Uxbridge and between Arnos Grove and Cockfosters following a late finish of engineering work. GOOD SERVICE on the rest of the line.

Metropolitan Line: Minor delays due to train cancellations.
Bakerloo Line: Minor delays due to an earlier signal failure at Wembley Central
